---
title: "C Programming"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Outfit:wght@300;400;600;700;900&family=Instrument+Sans:ital,wght@0,400;0,500;0,600;1,400&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<style>
:root{--ac:#0ea5e9;--bg:#07070b;--surface:#0e0e14;--card:#13131a;--card-h:#18181f;--border:rgba(255,255,255,.07);--border-h:rgba(255,255,255,.14);--t1:#f0eee8;--t2:#8a8a9a;--t3:#45454f;--fn-head:'Outfit',sans-serif;--fn-body:'Instrument Sans',sans-serif;--fn-mono:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;--r:12px}
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
body{background:var(--bg)!important;font-family:var(--fn-body);color:var(--t1)}
#quarto-content{padding:0!important;max-width:100%!important}
nav.navbar,footer,.quarto-title-banner{display:none!important}
a{text-decoration:none}
.page{overflow-x:hidden}
.c-hero{min-height:85vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;padding:clamp(5rem,10vw,8rem) clamp(1.5rem,7vw,7rem) clamp(3rem,5vw,4rem);position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 60% at 10% 50%,rgba(14,165,233,.07) 0%,transparent 70%),var(--bg)}
.c-hero::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;background-image:linear-gradient(var(--border) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,var(--border) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:48px 48px;mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 80% at 0% 50%,black 0%,transparent 70%)}
.c-kicker{font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ac);margin-bottom:1.5rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;position:relative;z-index:2}
.c-kicker::before{content:'';width:22px;height:1.5px;background:var(--ac)}
.c-h1{font-family:var(--fn-head)!important;font-size:clamp(3rem,7vw,6rem)!important;font-weight:900!important;line-height:.97!important;color:var(--t1)!important;letter-spacing:-.03em;margin-bottom:.4em!important;max-width:16ch;position:relative;z-index:2}
.hi{color:var(--ac)} .it{font-style:italic;color:var(--t2)}
.c-desc{font-family:var(--fn-body);font-size:clamp(.95rem,1.5vw,1.08rem);color:var(--t2);line-height:1.75;max-width:50ch;margin-bottom:2rem;position:relative;z-index:2}
.c-meta{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.8rem;margin-bottom:2.8rem;position:relative;z-index:2}
.c-chip{font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.64rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--t2);background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border:1px solid var(--border-h);padding:.38rem 1rem;border-radius:100px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem}
.c-chip b{color:var(--ac)}
.c-hero-btns{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.9rem;position:relative;z-index:2}
.btn-ac{font-family:var(--fn-head);font-weight:700;font-size:.9rem;color:#07070b!important;background:var(--ac);padding:.95rem 2.3rem;border-radius:6px;transition:all .22s;box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(14,165,233,.35);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem}
.btn-ac:hover{filter:brightness(1.1);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.btn-ghost{font-family:var(--fn-head);font-weight:600;font-size:.9rem;color:var(--t2)!important;background:transparent;padding:.95rem 2rem;border-radius:6px;border:1px solid var(--border-h);transition:all .22s}
.btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--ac);color:var(--t1)!important}
.s{padding:clamp(3.5rem,7vw,6rem) clamp(1.5rem,7vw,7rem);max-width:1400px;margin:0 auto}
.s-alt{background:var(--surface);border-top:1px solid var(--border);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.s-lbl{font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.66rem;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ac);margin-bottom:.8rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem}
.s-lbl::after{content:'';display:block;height:1px;width:28px;background:var(--ac);opacity:.5}
.s-title{font-family:var(--fn-head)!important;font-size:clamp(1.8rem,3.5vw,2.8rem)!important;font-weight:900!important;color:var(--t1)!important;letter-spacing:-.025em;margin-bottom:.4rem!important;line-height:1.08!important}
.s-title em{font-style:italic;color:var(--ac)}
.s-desc{font-family:var(--fn-body);font-size:.97rem;color:var(--t2);max-width:58ch;line-height:1.72;margin-bottom:2.8rem}
.grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(270px,1fr));gap:1px;background:var(--border);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r);overflow:hidden}
.gc{background:var(--card);padding:1.8rem;transition:background .2s;cursor:default}
.gc:hover{background:var(--card-h)}
.gc-num{font-family:var(--fn-head);font-size:2.5rem;font-weight:900;color:rgba(14,165,233,.1);line-height:1;margin-bottom:.4rem;display:block}
.gc-name{font-family:var(--fn-head);font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--t1);margin-bottom:.5rem}
.gc-desc{font-family:var(--fn-body);font-size:.8rem;color:var(--t2);line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:.8rem}
.pills{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.35rem}
.pill{font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.6rem;color:var(--t3);background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:.18rem .5rem;border-radius:3px;transition:color .2s,border-color .2s}
.gc:hover .pill{color:var(--ac);border-color:rgba(14,165,233,.25)}
.proj-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(260px,1fr));gap:1.2rem}
.pc{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r);padding:1.8rem;transition:all .25s;cursor:default;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.pc:hover{border-color:var(--ac);transform:translateY(-3px)}
.pc::before{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:var(--ac);transform:scaleX(0);transition:transform .35s}
.pc:hover::before{transform:scaleX(1)}
.pc-num{font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--t3);margin-bottom:.7rem;display:block}
.pc-name{font-family:var(--fn-head);font-size:.98rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--t1);margin-bottom:.5rem;line-height:1.3}
.pc-desc{font-family:var(--fn-body);font-size:.8rem;color:var(--t2);line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:1rem}
.pc-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.35rem}
.pc-tag{font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.6rem;color:var(--ac);background:rgba(14,165,233,.1);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.25);padding:.18rem .5rem;border-radius:3px}
.c-cta{text-align:center;padding:clamp(4rem,8vw,6rem) clamp(1.5rem,7vw,7rem);background:var(--surface);border-top:1px solid var(--border);position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.c-cta::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 60% at 50% 100%,rgba(14,165,233,.06) 0%,transparent 70%)}
.cta-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ac);background:rgba(14,165,233,.1);border:1px solid rgba(14,165,233,.25);padding:.35rem 1rem;border-radius:100px;margin-bottom:1.8rem}
.cta-dot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--ac);animation:pd 2s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes pd{0%,100%{transform:scale(1)}50%{transform:scale(1.6);opacity:.5}}
.c-cta h2{font-family:var(--fn-head)!important;font-size:clamp(2rem,4.5vw,3.2rem)!important;font-weight:900!important;color:var(--t1)!important;letter-spacing:-.025em;margin:0 auto 1rem!important;max-width:22ch;line-height:1.08!important;position:relative;z-index:1}
.c-cta h2 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--ac)}
.c-cta p{font-family:var(--fn-body);font-size:1rem;color:var(--t2);max-width:46ch;margin:0 auto 2.5rem;line-height:1.7;position:relative;z-index:1}
.cta-btns{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.9rem;justify-content:center;position:relative;z-index:1}
/* memory diagram */
.mem-diagram{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--r);padding:2rem;font-family:var(--fn-mono);font-size:.8rem;overflow-x:auto}
.mem-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.6rem;flex-wrap:wrap}
.mem-addr{color:var(--t3);min-width:90px;font-size:.7rem}
.mem-box{padding:.35rem .9rem;border:1px solid var(--border-h);border-radius:4px;color:var(--t1);min-width:70px;text-align:center}
.mem-box.hi-box{border-color:var(--ac);color:var(--ac);box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(14,165,233,.15)}
.mem-label{color:var(--t2);font-size:.72rem}
@media(max-width:640px){.c-hero{padding:4rem 1.5rem 2.5rem}.s{padding:3rem 1.5rem}}
</style>

<div class="page">
<section class="c-hero">
  <div class="c-kicker">Track 01 · Systems Programming</div>
  <h1 class="c-h1">C:<br><span class="hi">Closest</span><br><span class="it">to the machine.</span></h1>
  <p class="c-desc">The language that built Unix, Linux, and almost everything underneath modern software. Learn C and you'll understand how computers actually work — memory, pointers, and all.</p>
  <div class="c-meta">
    <span class="c-chip">⏱ Duration <b>8 Weeks</b></span>
    <span class="c-chip">👥 Level <b>Beginner</b></span>
    <span class="c-chip">📦 Projects <b>4 Builds</b></span>
    <span class="c-chip">🔑 Prereq <b>Git &amp; GitHub</b></span>
  </div>
  <div class="c-hero-btns">
    <a href="/contact.qmd" class="btn-ac">Enroll Now →</a>
    <a href="#curriculum" class="btn-ghost">View Curriculum</a>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="s" id="curriculum">
  <div class="s-lbl">Curriculum</div>
  <h2 class="s-title">8 Weeks, <em>Zero Hand-Holding</em></h2>
  <p class="s-desc">C doesn't hide things from you — and neither does this course. You'll leave knowing exactly what happens when your code runs.</p>
  <div class="grid">
    <div class="gc"><span class="gc-num">01</span><div class="gc-name">C Fundamentals</div><div class="gc-desc">Variables, data types, operators, control flow, and the compilation pipeline from .c to executable.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">gcc / clang</span><span class="pill">int/float/char</span><span class="pill">if/for/while</span><span class="pill">scanf/printf</span></div></div>
    <div class="gc"><span class="gc-num">02</span><div class="gc-name">Functions &amp; Scope</div><div class="gc-desc">Prototypes, pass-by-value, recursion, and understanding the call stack frame by frame.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">Prototypes</span><span class="pill">Recursion</span><span class="pill">Stack frames</span><span class="pill">Return values</span></div></div>
    <div class="gc"><span class="gc-num">03</span><div class="gc-name">Arrays &amp; Strings</div><div class="gc-desc">Arrays as contiguous memory, pointer-array duality, C-strings, and standard string library functions.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">Arrays</span><span class="pill">C-strings</span><span class="pill">string.h</span><span class="pill">Pointer arithmetic</span></div></div>
    <div class="gc"><span class="gc-num">04</span><div class="gc-name">Pointers &amp; Memory</div><div class="gc-desc">The heart of C. Pointer types, dereferencing, pointer-to-pointer, and visualising memory layouts.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">* and &amp;</span><span class="pill">Pointer types</span><span class="pill">void*</span><span class="pill">NULL</span></div></div>
    <div class="gc"><span class="gc-num">05</span><div class="gc-name">Dynamic Memory</div><div class="gc-desc">Heap allocation with malloc/calloc/realloc, freeing memory properly, and detecting memory leaks with Valgrind.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">malloc</span><span class="pill">free</span><span class="pill">Valgrind</span><span class="pill">Memory leaks</span></div></div>
    <div class="gc"><span class="gc-num">06</span><div class="gc-name">Structs &amp; Unions</div><div class="gc-desc">Custom data types, struct padding, typedef, and building simple linked data structures from scratch.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">struct</span><span class="pill">union</span><span class="pill">typedef</span><span class="pill">Padding</span></div></div>
    <div class="gc"><span class="gc-num">07</span><div class="gc-name">File I/O</div><div class="gc-desc">fopen, fread, fwrite, fprintf — reading and writing binary and text files, and error handling with errno.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">fopen/fclose</span><span class="pill">Binary files</span><span class="pill">errno</span><span class="pill">fseek</span></div></div>
    <div class="gc"><span class="gc-num">08</span><div class="gc-name">Data Structures in C</div><div class="gc-desc">Implement linked lists, stacks, queues, and a basic hash table using only C — no libraries, no shortcuts.</div><div class="pills"><span class="pill">Linked List</span><span class="pill">Stack</span><span class="pill">Queue</span><span class="pill">Hash Table</span></div></div>
  </div>
</div>

<section class="s-alt">
  <div class="s">
    <div class="s-lbl">Memory Model</div>
    <h2 class="s-title">You'll actually understand <em>this.</em></h2>
    <p class="s-desc">Most courses skip over memory. This one makes it the centrepiece — because everything else flows from it.</p>
    <div class="mem-diagram">
      <div style="color:var(--t3);font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:1rem">Stack — grows downward</div>
      <div class="mem-row"><div class="mem-addr">0x7fff...f0</div><div class="mem-box hi-box">main()</div><div class="mem-label">← current frame</div></div>
      <div class="mem-row"><div class="mem-addr">0x7fff...d0</div><div class="mem-box">int x = 42</div><div class="mem-label">local variable</div></div>
      <div class="mem-row"><div class="mem-addr">0x7fff...c8</div><div class="mem-box hi-box">int *p</div><div class="mem-label">← pointer on stack</div></div>
      <div style="color:var(--t3);font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;margin:1.2rem 0 1rem">Heap — grows upward</div>
      <div class="mem-row"><div class="mem-addr">0x55...1000</div><div class="mem-box hi-box">malloc(100)</div><div class="mem-label">← *p points here</div></div>
      <div class="mem-row"><div class="mem-addr">0x55...1064</div><div class="mem-box">[free block]</div><div class="mem-label">must call free()</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="s">
  <div class="s-lbl">Projects</div>
  <h2 class="s-title">Four Things You'll <em>Build in C</em></h2>
  <p class="s-desc">No toy programs. Each project solves a real problem and teaches you something you can't learn from reading.</p>
  <div class="proj-grid">
    <div class="pc"><span class="pc-num">Project 01</span><div class="pc-name">Custom Shell (mini-bash)</div><div class="pc-desc">Build a minimal Unix shell that reads commands, forks processes, handles pipes and redirects. Real systems programming.</div><div class="pc-tags"><span class="pc-tag">fork/exec</span><span class="pc-tag">pipes</span><span class="pc-tag">signals</span></div></div>
    <div class="pc"><span class="pc-num">Project 02</span><div class="pc-name">Memory Allocator</div><div class="pc-desc">Implement your own malloc() and free() using sbrk. Handle fragmentation, coalescing, and alignment correctly.</div><div class="pc-tags"><span class="pc-tag">sbrk</span><span class="pc-tag">Heap</span><span class="pc-tag">Fragmentation</span></div></div>
    <div class="pc"><span class="pc-num">Project 03</span><div class="pc-name">Linked List Library</div><div class="pc-desc">A complete doubly-linked list with insert, delete, search, and iterator — with tests for every function.</div><div class="pc-tags"><span class="pc-tag">Structs</span><span class="pc-tag">Pointers</span><span class="pc-tag">Testing</span></div></div>
    <div class="pc"><span class="pc-num">Project 04</span><div class="pc-name">File Compression Tool</div><div class="pc-desc">Implement run-length encoding to compress and decompress binary files. Process I/O and bitwise operations.</div><div class="pc-tags"><span class="pc-tag">File I/O</span><span class="pc-tag">Bitwise ops</span><span class="pc-tag">RLE</span></div></div>
  </div>
</div>

<section class="c-cta">
  <div class="cta-badge"><span class="cta-dot"></span>Track 01 · Enrolling</div>
  <h2>Understand code at the<br><em>deepest level.</em></h2>
  <p>C makes every other language feel transparent. Once you know C, you know how computing actually works.</p>
  <div class="cta-btns">
    <a href="/contact.qmd" class="btn-ac">Book First Session →</a>
    <a href="learn.qmd" class="btn-ghost">← All Courses</a>
  </div>
</section>
</div>
```
